title: JAMBREDREK: PURE DETECTIVE
description:
Many people have been killed in a small countryside area surrounded by forests.

You play as Walter, a detective. One day, his partner Nathan calls him about a new murder case. With help from Jax, a forensic expert, they find evidence that leads them to a lonely house deep in the forest.

At first, Walter wants to find answers. But soon, the investigation becomes a nightmare.

Walter and Nathan search the house and the forest. They find dead bodies, dark secrets, and strange creatures. The more they learn, the more they see that something evil is hiding there.

Walter must follow the clues, stay alive, and discover the truth behind the murders.

Features

• Voice acting

• First person horror experience

• Story driven detective investigation

• Explore a remote forest and abandoned locations

• Search for clues and uncover hidden secrets

• Encounter terrifying undead creatures

• Atmospheric environments inspired by classic horror games

• A dark mystery filled with suspense and horror

• Estimated playtime: 25–30 minutes
description_short: Investigate a series of brutal murders in a remote forest county. Search for clues, explore disturbing locations, encounter horrifying creatures, and uncover the truth in this first person horror experience.
